stemHtml:
Which of the following situations may trigger the publication of a NOTAM?

1. Extended construction work on the aerodrome
2. Work or repairs on the fuel supply area
3. Elevated security level increasing time at security checks
4. Intense solar radiation
5. Disease outbreak requiring new passenger vaccinations
6. Removal, modification, or installation of aerodrome lighting
7. Work on the manoeuvring area that does not affect aircraft movements
8. Changes to aerodrome designation signs
